NVDA.reasoning: TREND: Full daily EMA uptrend confirmed — EMA_10 (204.98) > EMA_21 (197.47) > EMA_50 (190.15) — with ADX_14 at 54.67 (up from 49.47 per prior wiki read), +DI 39.03 vs -DI 4.66. WIKI: Prior read (ADX 49.47, ROC +27%, pullback zone $204–$208) is confirmed and slightly upgraded by today's data (ADX 54.67). No contradiction — current data strengthens the bull case.
